title: Extension-Boundary Readiness Review
goal: Revalidate whether the closed extension boundary still matches the current first-party module contract and ecosystem reality.
non_goals: Inventing hypothetical downstream modules without concrete pressure

review_mode.review question: Does the current closed extension boundary still match the repo’s actual first-party module contract and dogfooding reality?

recommendation.dismiss: any immediate pressure to open the public extension boundary

drift_log: 2026-04-10: Review created during the bounded roadmap slice for extension-boundary readiness.
